title: malvastrum decipiens

side_effects: Malvastrum decipiens can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, including skin rashes, hives, and difficulty breathing. Long-term use can also lead to liver and kidney damage, as well as increased heart rate and blood pressure.
